new_check.description: Used semantic search for Guardian/authorization orientation

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search('Guardian authorization permission system') for orientation. Baseline used ls + grep. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Used semantic search for topic creation flow tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search('TopicsController create topic') to locate the creation flow. Baseline used grep. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Identifies can_edit_tags as a downstream caller affected by Guardian changes

modifications.rationale: Sense's sense_blast found can_edit_tags? (line 324-335) as a transitive caller of can_create_topic?. Baseline did not mention this downstream impact. Word check rewards blast-derived insight.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for Context.Next/Abort caller analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph(Context.Next, callers) and sense_graph(Context.Abort, callers) to find all middleware callers structurally. Baseline used grep. MCP check only passes for sense.
